name: Training Session
description: Internal training or workshop: intro, content blocks, Q&A, wrap-up.

cues.label: Pre-Roll
cues.notes: Hold while participants join. Display agenda or title slide.

cues.label: Welcome & Agenda
cues.notes: Facilitator introduces goals, agenda, and housekeeping.

cues.label: Content Block 1
cues.notes: First content segment. May include screen share.

cues.label: Q&A
cues.notes: Open questions. Wide shot or gallery view.

cues.label: Wrap-Up & Next Steps
cues.notes: Facilitator summarises and announces follow-up actions.

cues.label: Post-Roll
cues.notes: End slate. Stop recording after participants leave.
